scripts.build-all: npm run build-plugin && npm run seed-demo && npm run build-demo
scripts.build-plugin: npm run babel && npm run minify && cross-env TIDDLYWIKI_PLUGIN_PATH=plugins tiddlywiki demo --output build --build timelord
scripts.build-demo: cross-env TIDDLYWIKI_PLUGIN_PATH=plugins tiddlywiki demo --output build --build index
scripts.build-debug: npm run babel && cross-env TIDDLYWIKI_PLUGIN_PATH=plugins tiddlywiki debug --output build --build index
scripts.clean-debug: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('debug', {recursive: true, force: true}); fs.cpSync('demo', 'debug', {recursive: true});"
scripts.ensure-debug: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('debug')) fs.cpSync('demo', 'debug', {recursive: true});"
scripts.clean-serve: npm run seed-demo && npm run clean-debug && npm run serve
scripts.serve: npm run ensure-debug && npm run babel && cross-env TIDDLYWIKI_PLUGIN_PATH=plugins tiddlywiki debug --listen port=8081
